title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. The video claims it outperforms AlphaFold 3 and demonstrates applications in drug toxicity prediction, cancer drug discovery, drug repurposing, and antibody design.
